title: Blackmoor 65139 24cm Stainless Steel Colander/Sturdy Twin Handles and Footed Base/Durable and Stylish Kitchen Strainer/Rinse, Drain and Transport Foods
features: 24CM COLANDER – This 24cm colander is a practical and stylish kitchen essential, that will allow you to wash, strain, and transport a wide range of foods when cooking for friends and family.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL – The colander can be used for rinsing and drying pasta such as spaghetti, fruit, vegetables and more and features micro-perforations for quick draining. It will look great on your kitchen surfaces with its satin exterior and mirrored interior.

PORTABLE AND STURDY – The silver colander features two side handles for comfortable lifting plus a footed base which keeps it stable and allows for straining while standing the colander in a sink or on a draining board.
DURABLE – Made of high-quality stainless steel, the colander can last for years of use as it won’t stain or retain odours. It measures at 24 x 30 x 14cm.

BLACKMOOR - Blackmoor is the market leading provider of the very best kitchen essentials to inspire the everyday home cook. Find everything from pots and pans, to knife sets, bakeware essentials and cooking utensils all at the Blackmoor Amazon store page today!
description: Product Description Induction Compatible Stainless Steel Range The Blackmoor range of Stainless Steel kitchenware consists of saucepans, a milk pan, potato ricer, colander, three-tier steamer, mixing bowls, storage bowls, tea, coffee and sugar canisters, measuring spoons and a roasting tin. Each piece in the range is stylish yet affordable and will look great in any style of kitchen, whether it's modern or traditional. The pans can be used on all hob types, such as electric, gas, and induction, as well as on hot plates too. Previous page Versatile Prep, cook, and bake a wide variety of delicious dishes using the pieces in the range. All Hob Types The saucepans can be used on all hob types - electric, gas, and induction. Sleek Design The range will complement any modern kitchen. Easy Care Stainless steel won't stain or retain odours. Durability The range is hardwearing for long-term daily use.
